programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.sub-title: S03 : E06 Cantonese Seafood
programme.desc: Bring on the seafood! Home cook Mary Tang kicks off this episode of One World Kitchen 3 with a unique dish featuring chewy clams, sweet and bitter fermented black beans, and a collection of spices. Next, she makes us her favourite shrimp dish - Shrimp and Egg Fried Rice. Fluffy egg bits, lightly flavoured nutty brown rice, and a pop of tender shrimp works wonders for the taste buds. A common appetizer, Mary then walks us through a spicy concoction of deep-fried salt and pepper squid or Calamari. And who doesn't love lobster? Mary finishes off with Cantonese Lobster with Ginger and Scallions (yes, it tastes as good as it sounds!). A Cantonese take on the juicy protein, this dish is fried...

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.sub-title: S03 : E13 Balancing Sweet with Savoury
programme.desc: A tasty four-course Vietnamese meal using fruit? Yes, please! For her first dish, talented home cook Lisa Nguyen uses tangy tamarind pulp to balance flavours in a savoury bowl of Vietnamese Sour Fish Soup. Then, she combines tart pomelo and sweet pineapple with juicy crab meat for a flavourful salad. Next up, hot Chicken Coconut Curry with a hint of citrusy lemongrass, sweet potatoes, and a kaffir lime leaf. Pair it with a warm, toasty baguette and you're good to go! Lisa's last dish is a mouth-watering, classic Vietnamese dessert. Soft and chewy Steamed Banana Cake drizzled in a sweet velvety coconut sauce crunchy sesame seeds will have you begging for more!

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.sub-title: S03 : E20 Lebanese Small Plates
programme.desc: Talented home cook Jasmin Ibrahim prepares delicious, sharable small plates in this episode of One World Kitchen. First on the menu, Grilled Lamb Skewers. Wonderfully charred and seasoned with sweet cinnamon, potent all-spice, and a punch of garlic, these lamb skewers will be the hype at your next family get-together! Then, Jasmin makes a famous Lebanese classic - Falafel and Hummus (so tasty!). Next up, savoury Zucchini Fritters with a zesty yogurt sauce are added to the mix for a little dinner party pizzazz. Finally, Jasmin's favourite cheese is the star of this next dish - Grilled Halloumi. Served with a sweet and citrusy rose drink, this small plate will have your guests going crazy!

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.sub-title: S03 : E27 Cheese with Every Meal!
programme.desc: Cheese - a staple in traditional Greek cuisine! Talented home cook Joanna Chery fries up two delicious ap- petizers called Saganaki, both featuring two different types of cheese. First, she fries up kefaltyri, a hard, salty cheese in a dramatic burning flame of ouzo (licorice-flavoured alcohol) - Opa! Then, Joanna shows us a popular Fried Shrimp and Cheese appetizer using tasty feta and tender shrimp. Pair both dishes with a Greek rustic bread and you've nailed it! Next up, Joanna prepares a Greek classic - Spanakopita. This mouth-watering dish is made up of creamy ricotta, crispy phyllo pastry, fresh spinach, and a hint of dill (yum!). Moving on, Joanna showcases her all-time favourite...

programme.title: Spencer's Big 30
programme.sub-title: S02 : E04 Spring Fusion
programme.desc: Crispy, crunchy, salty, and sweet - Chef Spencer Watts prepares a Spring-inspired Thai feast in under 30 minutes, for around 30 dollars.

programme.title: Spencer's Big 30
programme.sub-title: S02 : E05 Comfort
programme.desc: In 30 minutes, chef Spencer Watts cooks up homey classics including a mouth-watering Chicken Stew and melt-in-your-mouth Herb Butter Biscuits.

programme.title: Spencer's Big 30
programme.sub-title: S02 : E06 That's Amore
programme.desc: Chef Spencer Watts cooks up an Italian feast for four including a cheesy Cannelloni and a fast and fluffy Tiramisu.

programme.title: Spencer's Big 30
programme.sub-title: S02 : E07 Night at the Pub
programme.desc: It's pub night in Spencer Watts' kitchen! Forget going out - Spencer's pub recipes are bold in flavour and mild on the wallet!

programme.title: Road Grill
programme.sub-title: S02 : E08 Teddy Bear Picnic
programme.desc: Teddy Bears of all age, shape, and size join our grill team with their owners for a day of games, rides and some teddy bear repair. Matt & the RG team are BBQing a menu even the pickiest eater will love. The menu: Grilled Almond Butter & Banana Sandwiches, Grilled Meatball Sub, Smoked White Cheddar Macaroni, and Quick & Snappy Ginger Lemon Ice Cream Sandwiches.

programme.title: Road Grill
programme.sub-title: S02 : E09 Animal Care Fundraiser
programme.desc: Llamas, horses, and pigs...Oh My! The RG team lends it support to a farm animal rescue. Matt sets up his grills during a weekend fundraiser and stays friendly to his animal buddies by serving up a vegetarian menu. The menu: Portobello Burger Stack, Smoked Corn Tamale with Goat Cheese& Salsa Fresca, Pizza Salad Sandwich, and Tabbouleh Salad

programme.title: Road Grill
programme.sub-title: S02 : E10 Day at the Pool
programme.desc: The neighbourhood outdoor pool is a great way to cool down on a hot summer day. Matt and the Grill Team are dipping their feet in the pool, splashing with the kids, and, of course, grilling up some fabulous eats to munch on while playing in the park or relaxing on your towel. The menu: BBQ'd Pork Tenderloin & Pears on Bagels, Grilled Asian Chicken Burger, Surf & Turf Kabobs with Arugula Pesto, and BBQ'd Cinnamon Donuts.

programme.title: Road Grill
programme.sub-title: S02 : E11 Chef's Graduation
programme.desc: It's graduation day at Chef School and Matt and the Grill team are sharing in the festivities. To congratulate the new Chefs, Matt has cooked up a masterful menu of fancy, yet simple, dishes. The menu: Mixed Seafood Grill on a Plank, Maple Rosemary Rotisserie Chicken, Dunked Hunan Lamb Rack, and Salmon Pastrami.

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.sub-title: S03 : E07 Moon Festival Menu
programme.desc: China celebrates harvest with the Moon Festival, when the moon is at its fullest during mid-autumn. The best part? A delicious feast! Cantonese expert Mary Tang prepares a common Moon Festival dish - earthy and tasty Mushroom Stir Fry. Then, she cooks up a mouth-watering, Cantonese must-have - Steamed Crab. Using flawless technique, Mary breaks the juicy crab into pieces, fries and steams it in scented spices and sauces. Another Moon Festival staple is Cantonese Roast Duck - Mary uses sweet-savoury Chinese five-spice powder, dark soy sauce, and aromatic white pepper to make a fragrant rub. Finally, Moon Cake at the Moon Festival a given. Exquisitely crafted with red bean paste and sweet...

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.sub-title: S03 : E14 A Banquet fit for an Emperor
programme.desc: Elegant Vietnamese fare is often inspired by legendary imperial city cuisine. In this One World Kitchen 3 episode, Host Lisa Nguyen gives us a magical taste of royalty with four colourful and delectable dishes. To start, Lisa ex- quisitely assembles a nice little starter for a royal dinner party - delicious Rice Cakes with Dried Shrimp. Next, she kicks it up a notch with a Spicy Hue Beef Noodle Soup - a truly slurp-worthy dish! For a touch of sweetness, Lisa then steams caramelized pork and tender shrimp dumplings in a lovely banana leaf. And there's no such thing as a classy Vietnamese dinner party without Baby Clams with Rice! The blend of contrasting flavours and textures in this...

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.sub-title: S03 : E21 All Sorts of Spice
programme.desc: Spices are extremely important to Lebanese cuisine and host Jasmin Ibrahim uses a ton of them in four tasty Lebanese dishes. First, she prepares two classic, aromatic toppings for a Lebanese breakfast bread called Mana- keesh. Next up, juicy chicken and smokey freekah seasoned with sweet cinnamon, citrusy cardamom, pungent all spice, and black peppercorns. This dish captures the essence of Lebanese cuisine. Moving on, Jasmin then makes a thick and spicy beef stew. It's eaten vermicelli rice and seasoned with a classic Lebanese 7-spice combo. Fragrant and delicious, this dish can be served family-style for everyone to enjoy! For dessert, Jasmin whips up a wonderfully rich batch of Spiced...

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.sub-title: S03 : E28 Classic Greek Recipes
programme.desc: Home cook Joanna Chery prepares a series of traditional Greek dishes including Stuffed Vine Leaves - a classic dish made of lemon-doused grape leaves and stuffed with fluffy rice, fragrant herbs, and juicy beef. Then, she prepares a healthy and hearty dish called Giant Baked Beans. Typically used as a side, it pairs well with Jo- anna's next dish - succulent roast lamb and lemony potatoes. Finally, Joanna makes a Greek specialty - Fried Dough Ribbons. Satisfy your sweet tooth with these fried, coiled dough ribbons drizzled with sweet honey and sprinkled with sugar. Simple, fun, and evERS-popular in Greek cuisine, this dish is great for sharing amongst family and friends.

programme.title: Spencer's Big 30
programme.sub-title: S02 : E08 French Canadian
programme.desc: In under 30 minutes, chef Spencer Watts cooks up four hearty, rich, and mouth-watering French-Canadian dishes.

programme.title: Spencer's Big 30
programme.sub-title: S02 : E09 Fajita Night
programme.desc: In just 30 minutes, host Spencer Watts cooks up a feast for four that's full of Mexican flavours!

programme.title: Spencer's Big 30
programme.sub-title: S02 : E10 Meatballs and Shakshuka
programme.desc: A Moroccan meal in 30 minutes? That's right! Spencer Watts inspires with Moroccan dishes that are quick to make and bold in flavour.

programme.title: Spencer's Big 30
programme.sub-title: S02 : E11 Burgers and Fries
programme.desc: Host Spencer Watts offers up his tips and tricks for a classic Burger and Fries dinner with a healthy twist.

programme.title: Road Grill
programme.sub-title: S02 : E12 Picnic Maze Craze
programme.desc: The Road Grill team goes rural and gets lost in hedge mazes at Saunders Farm. Luckily, they find their way out in time to cook up some BBQ and feed all families at the farm. The menu: Grilled Chicken Legs with Crunchy Chip Crust, Smoked Ham with Maple Mustard Glaze, Planked Asparagus Bundles with Cheese and Prosciutto, and Cobb Salad.

programme.title: Road Grill
programme.sub-title: S02 : E13 Equestrian School
programme.desc: Matt and the Road Grill Team get in the saddle and get inspired to grill up some BBQ! With a full school of riders to feed they grill up some Wild West plates. The menu: Texas Rockets, Perfect Beef Jerky, Beef Brisket, and Hearty Beet & fennel Salad.

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.sub-title: S03 : E20 Lebanese Small Plates
programme.desc: Talented home cook Jasmin Ibrahim prepares delicious, sharable small plates in this episode of One World Kitchen. First on the menu, Grilled Lamb Skewers. Wonderfully charred and seasoned with sweet cinnamon, potent all-spice, and a punch of garlic, these lamb skewers will be the hype at your next family get-together! Then, Jasmin makes a famous Lebanese classic - Falafel and Hummus (so tasty!). Next up, savoury Zucchini Fritters with a zesty yogurt sauce are added to the mix for a little dinner party pizzazz. Finally, Jasmin's favourite cheese is the star of this next dish - Grilled Halloumi. Served with a sweet and citrusy rose drink, this small plate will have your guests going crazy!

programme.title: Feed My Soul, V!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E12 Mezze Marathon
programme.desc: Vanessa plans a Mediterranean mezze-themed menu with a table to match! There's kofta, hummus, tabbouleh, fattoush, muhammara, and so much more!

programme.title: Global Veggies
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Vietnam, Lebanon, China, Germany
programme.desc: Join chef Pino Di Cerbo in the Global Veggies kitchen as he creates veggie dishes inspired by Vietnam - Vietnamese Green Beans, Lebanon - Watermelon Tabbouleh, China - Signapore-Style Spaghetti Squash Noodles, and Germany - Celeriac Sauerbraten and Slaw!

programme.title: Up the Dish
programme.sub-title: S01 : E09 Grilled Cheese and Tomato Soup
programme.desc: The ultimate childhood comfort food, Grilled Cheese and Tomato Soup! Missy Hui takes this dish up with a basil- infused tomato soup that's ubERS-creamy and fresh! Don't forget the grilled cheese - gooey Havarti, provolone, and cheddar ooze out of this sandwich for an ultra-indulgent dish. Tiera Singh's twist on toast and tomatoes? Panzanella Salad! Ripe, seasonal tomatoes are tossed with a tangy capERS-vinegar dressing that is soaked up by crunchy croutons. Going higher? Micah Trainor's Seared Halloumi and Glazed Fruit grills the cheese - no bread needed! Seared halloumi is topped with bourbon-glazed fruit for a savoury-sweet vegetarian dish. Poppy Sandler's Lobster Roll with Sweet Corn...

programme.title: Bring on the Karbs
programme.sub-title: S02 : E02 Brunch Munch
programme.desc: Chefs Erica and Josh Karbelnik go head-to-head to see who can come up with the most tantalizing brunch! Josh makes congee and dumplings while Erica prepares a Middle Eastern spread!

programme.title: Cook Like a Chef
programme.sub-title: S06 : E01 Egg Episode with Chef Katie Ardington
programme.desc: Eggs are a perfect beginning for so many recipes and meals; Chef-host Katie Ardington is happy to "whisk" us along through a few of her favourites!

programme.title: Cook Like a Chef
programme.sub-title: S06 : E02 Tomato Episode with Chef Natalia Machado
programme.desc: Join our host, Chef Natalia Machado as she introduces us to her favourite techniques for using a wide variety of versatile, savoury tomatoes.

programme.title: Cook Like a Chef
programme.sub-title: S06 : E03 Duck Episode with Chef Craig Wong
programme.desc: Chef-host Craig Wong is our duck sherpa in this well-travelled episode of Cook Like a Chef"... first stop? Peking Duck!

programme.title: Cook Like a Chef
programme.sub-title: S06 : E04 Potato Episode with Chef Derek Dammann

programme.title: The Wizard of Whatever

programme.desc: Chef Kyle Crawford unveils four spellbinding dishes! First up, clams and artichoke! Next, radicchio risotto. Followed by an Arabic twist on baked potatoes! Finishing with a BC roasted salmon!

programme.title: The Wizard of Whatever
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Pancakes, Lobster Soup, Duck, and Flan
programme.desc: Chef Kyle Crawford unveils four spellbinding dishes! First up, wild rice pancakes! Next, lobster-lime soup! Followed by a Tuscan porchetta-style duck! Finishing with a flan with port-soaked cherries!

programme.title: The Wizard of Whatever
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Tart, Tuna, Carbonara, and Claufoutis
programme.desc: Chef Kyle Crawford unveils four spellbinding dishes! First up, a mushroom-brie tart! Next, tuna with grilled fennel-kale! Followed by classic spaghetti Carbonara! Finishing with a berry clafoutis!

programme.title: Everyday Excellent

programme.desc: With only 30 minutes and the clock ticking, can Vanessa make a game day spread for 4 for about 40 bucks? On the menu: buffalo veggie pakora wings with yogurt ranch, quesadillas with fresh guacamole, black bean chili, and root beer floats!

programme.title: Everyday Excellent
programme.sub-title: S01 : E19 Teatime Treats
programme.desc: With only 30 minutes and the clock ticking, can Vanessa make a teatime spread for 4 for about 40 bucks? On the menu: cucumber sandwiches, ham and cheese deviled eggs, lemon scones with raspberry jam, and matcha white chocolate-covered strawberries!

programme.title: Everyday Excellent
programme.sub-title: S01 : E18 Izakaya Bar Bites
programme.desc: With only 30 minutes and the clock ticking, can Vanessa make an Izakaya-inspired meal for 4 for about 40 bucks? On the menu: chicken yakitori, chili lime edamame, miso soup, veggie tempura, and tuna sashimi!

programme.desc: Aqua Viva presenta al Pastor Sergio Hornung cada semana compartiendo un mensaje cargado de fe, vision y herramientas practicas.

programme.title: Impactando las Naciones
programme.desc: En Impactando Naciones, la Pastora Wanda Rolón comparte mensajes de fe, esperanza y poder espiritual para transformar vidas, familias y comunidades.

programme.desc: Karina Yapor y destacados periodistas analizan con profundidad las noticias de hoy.

programme.title: Sin Miedo a Nada

programme.title: Fe y Fuego

programme.title: Wild Window
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Wild Window
programme.desc: A look at the dazzling fish that inhabit the marine landscapes of the Tropical Pacific; exploring their daily lives as they forage and school in the depths of the ocean.

programme.title: Coastal Windmill Relaxation
programme.desc: Taking viewers to two different South Australia Wind Farms; filmed at South Australia's Cape Jervis, overlooking Saint Vincent Gulf and Woakwine Range.

programme.title: Wharariki Beach Track: New Zealand
programme.desc: Wharariki's spectacular coastal trail with caverns, islands, sand dunes, and more.

programme.title: Serene Waters: Diablo Lake, Washington
programme.desc: The serene calm of the Diablo Lake, surrounded by majestic mountains.

programme.title: Tranquil Tide: Ca'te d'Azur
programme.desc: The medieval town of Menton on the French Côte d'Azur, where the sun glistens on iridescent water.

programme.title: Breezy Beach: Dominican Republic
programme.desc: Discovering the dazzling sapphire waters on the Dominican Republic's Playa Las Galeras.

programme.title: Beach Paradise: Hawaii
programme.desc: Spending a restful moment in Maui, a tropical paradise of gleaming white sand beaches and turquoise waters.

programme.title: Amazing View: Guadeloupe
programme.desc: The relaxing seaside breeze of this Caribbean paradise from the comfort of the balcony.

programme.title: Fly Over Kelingking Beach: Indonesia
programme.desc: A bird's eye view of a scenic beach surrounded by pristine waters and high cliffs.

programme.title: Wildlife Wonders of South America
programme.desc: A sunrise at Salar de Uyuni in Bolivia with flamingo and llama scenes from high altitude volcanic salt lakes; welcoming new life in the Chilean landscapes of San Pedro Atacama; the Torres del Paine National Park in Patagonia.

programme.title: Lush Vineyards: Portugal
programme.desc: The jaw-droppingly beautiful Douro Valley, Portugal's most scenic wine regions.

programme.title: Turtle Paradise
programme.desc: Dive into an undersea world inhabited by the sea turtles; featuring real-time video scenes captured from around the Caribbean, paired with gentle underwater sounds and calming music for relaxation.

programme.title: Cabo Waves Crashing
programme.desc: The rugged yet relaxing sounds of powerful waves breaking on a secluded white-sandy beach in Cabo San Lucas.

programme.title: Crystal Blue Waves
programme.desc: The sights and sounds of big waves breaking along a coastal pier on a blue-sky day.

programme.title: Above the Rocky Mountains
programme.desc: Showcasing one of the world's most famous mountain ranges, Banff National Park, from a higher perspective and is paired with healing music and subtle real-life nature sounds; soaring over places like Lake Louise and more from the Canadian Rockies.

programme.title: Rainforest Waterfall: Costa Rica -- Tenorio Volcano National Park, Costa Rica
programme.desc: In the rainforest of Costa Rica's Tenorio Volcano National Park, admire waterfalls plunging into a cerulean lagoon.

programme.title: Wairere Falls: New Zealand
programme.desc: The Wairere Falls of New Zealand.

programme.title: Cape Reinga & Giant Sand Dunes: New Zealand
programme.desc: Experiencing a waterfall flowing down a forest wall, surrounded by overgrown vines.

programme.title: Beach Paradise: Hawaii
programme.desc: Spending a restful moment in Maui, a tropical paradise of gleaming white sand beaches and turquoise waters.

programme.title: Waterfalls of the World 2
programme.desc: Places like Iguazu Falls in Argentina, Patagonia in Chile, Banff and Jasper in Alberta, McWay Falls and Hidden Falls in Big Sur, California, Columbia River Falls in Oregon, and more, paired with soothing ambient music by Relax Moods.

programme.title: A Day in Paradise
programme.desc: Filmed in 2013 by David Huting, the tiny island is hidden off of the northeastern coast of the outer Fiji Islands (near Taveuni), and boasts a perfect white sandy beach, groves of palm trees, and a majestic lagoon that shelters the island from all sides. It has more turtle visitors than humans!

programme.title: Coastal Spring Flowers
programme.desc: Nature scenes from California's coast.

programme.title: Tutoko River: New Zealand
programme.desc: Rushing waters through rocky rapids.

It has more turtle visitors than humans!

programme.title: Coral Kingdom
programme.desc: Arrangements of colorful coral sway to the rhythm of the tide, with aquatic visitors stopping by to enjoy the scenery.

programme.title: A Day on the Napali Coast
programme.desc: An ambient nature film features the sights and sounds of the 11-mile Kalalau Trail on the Hawaiian island of Kauai.

programme.title: America From Above
programme.desc: Part one of a new series of ambient drone films for relaxation, America From Above is a spectacular yet ultra-soothing 1-hour long natural journey that sweeps viewers gently above America's vistas. You'll begin the farmlands of Iowa, soaring west through the Rocky Mountains of Colorado, then on to Utah's iconic red rock landscapes and finally ending on the West Coast with a familiar voyage over Big Sur and then back to San Diego just in time for sunset.

programme.title: Yosemite Magic: Yosemite National Park
programme.desc: Yosemite is known all over the world for its granite cliffs, waterfalls, and giant sequoias.

programme.title: The Food Guide
programme.sub-title: S01 : E26 The Food Guide Budapest, Hungary
programme.desc: Traditional Hungarian fare is a hearty affair, not meant for the faint-hearted. The cuisine has imbibed influences from the days of its Ottoman occupation as well as from the other nations of the Austro-Hungarian Empire and traditional Jewish cuisine. Celebrity chef and traveller, Joe Remblance explores the nuances of this cuisine in Budapest, the capital city, through local dishes such as Schnitzel, Gundel Palacsinta, Hungarian Lángos and Tokaji, a sweet Hungarian wine.

programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 The Food Guide Manchester, England
programme.desc: The dining scene in Manchester has changed considerably over the last 20 years. Stuffy fine dining places have been replaced with street food and flavours from across the globe. programme.desc: People of Indian ancestry comprise Singapore’s third-largest ethnic group, in fact, Singapore traces its origins to two Sanskrit words – ‘Singha’ or lion and ‘Pura’ or city. And yet, from fish head curry to Indian ‘Rojak’, Indian food in Singapore is something that confuses visitors from India. How did the “Indian” dishes of the Lion City come to be so distinct?

programme.desc: Our host travels to Douro Valley and is seen exploring vineyards and learning about the history behind it. Concluding his journey at Troia and Évora.

programme.title: Great World Hotels
programme.sub-title: S01 : E15 Great World Hotels Atlantis 2, Dubai
programme.desc: Rising graciously from the Arabian Gulf towards the azure sky, Atlantis, the Palm stands on the crescent of the iconic Palm Jumeirah. The exotic resort captures the world’s imagination with its mystical aura.

programme.title: Unwind
programme.sub-title: S01 : E09 Unwind Hotel Ellbee, India
programme.desc: Rishikesh, the heartland of yoga, is widely known for mystical stories, spiritual awakenings, rejuvenation and peace. Travel enthusiast, Larissa D’Sa comes to Rishikesh looking for a relaxing getaway, and loses herself in its natural beauty. From relishing earthy Garhwali flavours to witnessing the larger-than-life Ganga aarti, her experiences in the land, where great sages and famous musicians came to find peace, help her to unwind.

programme.title: Food Stories
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Food Stories, Malay
programme.desc: What does the cuisine of Singapore, which has almost entirely been shaped by immigrants, tell us about the culture of the land?

programme.title: The Moroccon Chronicles
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 The Moroccon Chronicles Uncharted Marrakech
programme.desc: The evocative city of Marrakech has long provided great artists with inspiration, but will it be able to give Rafe the adventure he seeks?

programme.title: City Breaks
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 City Breaks Munich, Germany
programme.desc: Often called Germany's most livable city, Munich is also one of its most historic, artistic, and entertaining cities. Until 1871, it was the capital of an independent Bavaria. Kristina Guberman admires the elegance of the city through its attractions such as the Gothic city palace, Residenz, the popular Marienplatz square and the stylish BMW Museum.

programme.title: Off The Grid
programme.sub-title: S01 : E12 Off The Grid Srinagar, India
programme.desc: Alex is in Srinagar putting up on a houseboat. She explores the Dal lake, tries Kashmiri Tea, and ends her day with a traditional Kashmiri platter – Wazwan.

programme.title: Bliss
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 Bliss, Sunny Beach Bulgaria
programme.desc: Along with basking in the idyllic beach scenes of Bulgaria, Kirsty admires the art in Helena resort, and experiences the local traditions and cuisine.

programme.title: Best From The Rest
programme.sub-title: S01 : E31 Best From The Rest Oman Must Sees
programme.desc: Here is a list of Oman’s must-see attractions, each of which unveils a unique facet of this Middle Eastern gem.

programme.title: Food Fact Fun
programme.sub-title: S01 : E22 Food Fact Fun New Taipei City, Taiwan
programme.desc: In New Taipei Alex explores the fish, market San Domingo fort, the Gold museum, New Taipei Yingge Ceramics Museum and at last he ends his journey with letting off a sky lantern at Jiufen village.

programme.title: Viajar Peru
programme.sub-title: S01 : E08 Viajar Peru Huascaran
programme.desc: In the rugged heart of the Peruvian Andes, Milagros sets out on an exhilarating adventure in Huascaran National Park.

programme.title: Backpack
programme.sub-title: S01 : E42 Backpack Lisbon, Portugal
programme.desc: Join our host as he starts his backpacking journey of Portugal, starting from Lisbon. Exploring important monuments from Belem tower to Portas Do Sol.

programme.title: Xplore Egypt
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Xplore Egypt Cairo
programme.desc: Cairo, the sprawling and impressive Egyptian capital, has a rich history that goes beyond books and continues to the present day.

programme.title: Off The Grid
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 Off The Grid Tsomoriri, India
programme.desc: Alexandra starts her journey from Tsomoriri where on the way she stops at Baralacha Pass. Later she visits Korzok village, interacts with locals and dresses up in a traditional Ladakhi attire.

programme.title: Xp Guide
programme.sub-title: S01 : E53 Xp Guide Tel Aviv, Israel
programme.desc: Israel's art scene, which has been overlooked by the art world for years, is now on the rise.

programme.title: The Food Guide
programme.sub-title: S01 : E26 The Food Guide Budapest, Hungary
programme.desc: Traditional Hungarian fare is a hearty affair, not meant for the faint-hearted. The cuisine has imbibed influences from the days of its Ottoman occupation as well as from the other nations of the Austro-Hungarian Empire and traditional Jewish cuisine. Celebrity chef and traveller, Joe Remblance explores the nuances of this cuisine in Budapest, the capital city, through local dishes such as Schnitzel, Gundel Palacsinta, Hungarian Lángos and Tokaji, a sweet Hungarian wine.

programme.title: Viajar Peru
programme.sub-title: S01 : E09 Viajar Peru Lima
programme.desc: Dramatic views of the Pacific Ocean, brightly colored colonial buildings, world-class cuisine – the capital city of Peru, Lima has a lot going for it. Milagros reveals the treasures of her home city from the diverse neighborhoods, like the upscale Miraflores to the bohemian Barranco. She also shows a side of Lima where one can enjoy fun adventures with the marine creatures.

programme.title: Backpack
programme.sub-title: S01 : E43 Backpack Sintra, Portugal
programme.desc: Our host travels to Sintra, known for its castles and palaces. Learning and exploring about castles, he further travels to the historic town Obidos.

programme.title: Xplore Egypt
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Xplore Egypt Aswan
programme.desc: Seep visits the colorful Nubian villages on the west bank of the Nile, treasures of one of Africa's oldest and richest cultures.

programme.title: Off The Grid
programme.sub-title: S01 : E07 Off The Grid Leh. India
programme.desc: Alexandra explores the rugged region of Leh, visiting Thiksey Monastery, Leh Palace and Shanti Stupa. Later she sets out for a five hour drive to the picturesque Pangong Lake and stays in the tent.

programme.title: Xp Guide
programme.sub-title: S01 : E55 Xp Guide Jerusalem, Israel
programme.desc: Travel enthusiast, Aradhana Jagota experiences the spiritual magnetism of Jerusalem, a holy city for Muslims, Christians and Jews.

programme.title: The Food Guide
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 The Food Guide Salzburg, Austria
programme.desc: Salzburg, boasts a culinary scene as sensational as Mozart, the composer who was born here. Chef Joe Remblance enjoys some of its celebrated dishes.

programme.title: Viajar Peru
programme.sub-title: S01 : E10 Viajar Peru Trujillo
programme.desc: In the last leg of her journey, Milagros goes to Trujillo, where she introduces the flavors of the northern region of Peru and also Marinera – the sensuous national dance. But the highlight in Trujillo are the forgotten sites like Chan Chan and Huaca del Moche, where secrets from Peru’s pre-Incan past begin to unfold.

programme.title: Backpack
programme.sub-title: S01 : E44 Backpack Coimbra, Portugal
programme.desc: Driek travels to Coimbra. Where he visits the Santa Cruz Church, a park and Santa Claire monastery. Concluding with a visit to Coimbra University.

programme.title: Xplore Egypt
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Xplore Egypt Luxor
programme.desc: Seep visits Luxor, where she is impressed by the magnificent monuments that have survived from Thebes, the capital of ancient Egypt.

programme.title: Off The Grid
programme.sub-title: S01 : E08 Off The Grid Nubra valley, India
programme.desc: A 106 feet Buddha statue mesmerizes Alex as she explores Diskit Monastery in Nubra Valley. She tries the traditional ladakhi food and explores Leh city, by visiting Gurdwara Pathar Sahib and a school.

programme.title: XP Guide
programme.sub-title: S01 : E24 Xp Guide Amman, Jordan
programme.desc: Amman, the capital of Jordan sits on a wealth of seven hills, a monotonous sea of white cement structures with the occasional minarets and buildings.

programme.title: The Food Guide
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 The Food Guide Manchester, England
programme.desc: The dining scene in Manchester has changed considerably over the last 20 years. Stuffy fine dining places have been replaced with street food and flavours from across the globe. Joe Remblance explores this cosmopolitan approach that has seeped into Manchester’s culinary scene though European dishes such as Black Pudding and Tzaziki, Asian dishes such as Chicken Curry and innovative dishes such as a fried chicken waffle pizza and deep-fried Cadbury Crème Eggs.

programme.title: The Moroccon Chronicles
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 The Moroccon Chronicles Eternal Love in Chefchaouen
programme.desc: Rafe visits Chefchaouen and is instantly besotted with the city, much to the confusion of the locals who are baffled by his eccentricities.

programme.title: Backpack
programme.sub-title: S01 : E45 Backpack Porto, Portugal
programme.desc: Driek today travels to Porto, surrounded by chapela, monasteries and churches. He visits a Wine cellar and learns about wine production of Portugal.

programme.title: Xplore Egypt
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Xplore Egypt Alexandria
programme.desc: Alexandria in Egypt is a city that has reinvented itself over the centuries but has not forgotten its roots.

programme.desc: Alexandra explores Kargil, where she is invited for breakfast by the owner of a resort where she is putting up and understands the influence of the cultures on the locals.

programme.title: Food STories Singapore
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Food Stories Singapore, Indian Influence
programme.desc: People of Indian ancestry comprise Singapore’s third-largest ethnic group, in fact, Singapore traces its origins to two Sanskrit words – ‘Singha’ or lion and ‘Pura’ or city. And yet, from fish head curry to Indian ‘Rojak’, Indian food in Singapore is something that confuses visitors from India. How did the “Indian” dishes of the Lion City come to be so distinct?

programme.title: Classic Races
programme.desc: The German Rally Championship has been running since 1970. At the 1983 race, the sporty models from Opel saw exceptional success.

programme.title: Classic Races
programme.desc: With the introduction of the Group D-Monsters in the World Rally Championships, the fight for the title got harder and harder. That's why Audi brought a strong trump onto the road in 1985 - The Sport Quattro.

programme.title: Classic Races
programme.desc: In 1954, Mercedes returns to the Grand Prix circuit after 20 years of abstinence.

programme.title: Historic Formula V
programme.desc: In the late 1950s in America, the first Formula V racers were produced. These small cars were seen on tracks until the end of the 1970s, but their heritage would live on through an association known as Historic Formula V Europe.

programme.title: Tuning
programme.sub-title: S01 : E14 Tuning
programme.desc: The largest car exhibition in the world. More than 900 exhibitors present their latest models.

programme.title: Tuning
programme.sub-title: S01 : E07 Tuning
programme.desc: Testing what Corvettes, Porsches and Ferraris really have under the hood after SKN Tuning.

programme.title: Tuning
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Tuning
programme.desc: Racing driver Patrick Simon visits Aston Martin. The manufacturer introduces The Aston Martin V12 Zagato at the Nürburgring.

programme.title: Tuning
programme.sub-title: S01 : E12 Tuning
programme.desc: Since 1967, Las Vegas has hosted one of the largest Car and Tuning shows in the world, the SEMA show. In the United States, car freedom is still important and at this show one can find extremes.

programme.title: Tuning
programme.sub-title: S01 : E22 Tuning
programme.desc: The tuner from Waiblingen in Swabia, Germany, has over 30 years' experience in tuning Mercedes-Benz cars.

programme.title: Tuning
programme.sub-title: S01 : E08 Tuning
programme.desc: An event for automotive and motor sports enthusiasts where the most extreme vehicles can be seen.

programme.title: Pikes Peak International Hill Climb
programme.sub-title: S01 : E07 Pikes Peak International Hill Climb
programme.desc: High winds force a shortened course as drivers tackle the mountain. GT4 Trophy by Yokohama and Time Attack One classes push for top times in a demanding run where changing conditions and altitude make every second count.

programme.title: Pikes Peak International Hill Climb
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 Pikes Peak International Hill Climb
programme.desc: Exhibition and Open Wheel classes tackle a shortened course due to high winds, featuring Honda's hydrogen-powered CR-V debut and Fred Veach's emotional farewell run on the mountain.

programme.title: Pikes Peak International Hill Climb
programme.sub-title: S01 : E08 Pikes Peak International Hill Climb
programme.desc: The Open Division tackles a shortened course due to high winds, featuring rookie runs, Lonni Unser's charge, J.R. Hildebrand's NASCAR stock car, a Michèle Mouton tribute, and Ford's radical electric Mustang Mach-E.

programme.title: Pikes Peak International Hill Climb
programme.sub-title: S01 : E09 Pikes Peak International Hill Climb
programme.desc: The Unlimited Division features exotic prototypes, rookie standouts, Robin Shute in a brutal Camaro, and a fierce Nova Proto showdown between Diego De Gasperi and Simone Faggioli.

programme.title: MotorStories
programme.sub-title: S01 : E07 MotorStories
programme.desc: Frank Slopianka is a racing junkie and constantly takes part in such events; US car fans Kati and Patrick join him for the Race 61, a rock and race festival in Finowfurt near Berlin.

programme.title: MotorStories
programme.sub-title: S01 : E15 MotorStories
programme.desc: German entrepreneur Tillmann Moritz loves vintage cars and has a dream of driving through the U.S. in his Mercedes Cabriolet 280 SE 3.5; before he can make his dream come true, he needs to get his car across the French Riviera.

programme.title: MotorStories
programme.sub-title: S01 : E08 MotorStories
programme.desc: Tillmann starts his dream journey in New York, the city that never sleeps; with his Mercedes 280 SE convertible he visits the legendary classic car dealer Eliot Cuker who made his fortune with his passion for old cars.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.desc: The Jaguar XF-S is supposed to put pressure on BMW, Audi and co. in the business class segment; it brings V6 power, 380 HP output and all-wheel drive.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.desc: BMW offers the X2 as a compact hipster SUV for young people; the DS 7 Crossback wants to convey the French lifestyle; Jaguar's E-Pace enters the market as a smaller version of the F-Pace.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.desc: There are SUV models that have proven themselves, such as the Range Rover. The British manufacturer wants to reach an even broader audience and introduces a small Rangy: the Velar.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.desc: With three and a half million units sold worldwide, the Mercedes Sprinter is one of the most popular commercial vehicles; in its third generation, it is more modern than ever.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.desc: Porsche quits the diesel business; hybrids such as the Cayenne E-Hybrid are expected to become their focus of attention; the team takes the BMW X4 on tour in the United States; there's also mountain climbing with the Volkswagen Touareg in Austria.

programme.title: Put Your Car on TV
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Put Your Car on TV
programme.desc: A Ford Mustang and a limited edition Chevrolet Corvette try to win the competition.

programme.title: Put Your Car on TV
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 Put Your Car on TV
programme.desc: Every car owner gets the chance to bring their tuned machines to the Sofitel Hotel Dubai Jumeirah beach; there, Saif Hattawi will assess each car based on speed, style and sound.

programme.title: Put Your Car on TV
programme.desc: The Walk at JBR, the most prestigious location in Dubai, is the background for fast customized cars in the Middle East; among the competitors are a Lamborghini Aventador and a GMC Chevrolet.

programme.title: Put Your Car on TV
programme.desc: Mylene Gomera and Saif Hattawi are on the hunt for cars and ask car owners to bring their customized vehicles to Dubai; among the presented cars are a limited edition Mercedes SLS and an Audi R8.

programme.title: Put Your Car on TV
programme.desc: A tuned Lexus GSF, a Ford Mustang and a McLaren MP4-12C are put in the spotlight.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The McLaren Artura combines hybrid technology with racing DNA. Ferrari also counts on the combined power of electricity and petrol in the 296 GTB. The Mercedes S 580e is supposed to have a consumption of less than 1 liter per 100 km.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The McLaren 600 LT: A cornering machine with dynamics that make car fanatics' hearts beat faster. In the Aston Martin Vantage Roadster, British tradition and power merge to create an irresistible open-air experience. And: The Alfa Romeo Giulia GTAm.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The Audi RS6 has evolved from a family car to a technological masterpiece, but its competition is not to be underestimated. A look at the history of sports station wagons shows how they have become the versatile performance machines of today.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The Porsche 911 Dakar is one of the most extreme series 911 of all times. With its predecessor, the Porsche 953, the manufacturer won the legendary Rallye Paris Dakara in 1984. We test the exceptional 911 offroad.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: From racing legends to sporty luxury road cruisers: No one bridges the gap between driving pleasure and comfort as well as BMW. We put the racetrack icon M4 CSL to the test. And: Is the BMW M760e more of a driver's or a chauffeur's car?

programme.title: DreamCars
programme.desc: Italian supercars are some of the most exciting cars in the world; from Ferrari, Lamborghini Aventador or the Pagani Huayra, they are the most beautiful and the fastest cars in the world.

programme.title: DreamCars
programme.desc: Whether it is the Aston Martin Vanquish, Bentley Continental GT Speed, McLaren P1, English supercars are fast, spectacular and beautiful sports cars.

programme.title: DreamCars
programme.desc: Whether it is the Porsche 918 Spyder, the Audi R8, the Mercedes-AMG GT or the BMW i8, they are the fast, spectacular and coveted supercars.

programme.title: DreamCars
programme.desc: They are fast and exciting cars built for extreme speeds; supercars from Ferrari, Lamborghini, McLaren, Pagani and Porsche.

programme.title: DreamCars
programme.sub-title: S02 : E27 DreamCars

programme.title: Mystic Sk8 Cup 2025 - Live delayed (Vert/Bowl/Street) Part 2
programme.desc: The Mystic Sk8 Cup 2025 celebrates its 30th anniversary at the legendary Štvanice Island Skatepark. This international skateboarding event welcomes over 180 riders from all over the world to compete in the street, bowl and vert disciplines.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2024
programme.sub-title: S01 : E15 WOF 2024 #15: Absa Cape Epic 2024 - Best of WOMEN
programme.desc: The ABSA Cape Epic is the world’s premier mountain bike stage race. The route changes every year, leading aspiring amateur and professional mountain bikers from around the world through 648 Untamed kilometres of unspoilt scenery and up 15 475m of climbing.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2025
programme.sub-title: S01 : E12 WOF 2025 #12: Mediterranean Epic by Scott 2025
programme.desc: February 6-9, 2025, Oropesa del Mar (ESP): The Mediterranean Epic is a UCI 4-stage race where mountain bikers can enjoy mountain biking to the fullest on the course around Oropesa del Mar in the province of Castellón in Spain.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2025
programme.sub-title: S01 : E19 WOF 2025 #19: ABSA Cape Epic Series - Episode 1
programme.desc: The Absa Cape Epic is known as one of the toughest mountain bike stage races in the world and pushes riders to their physical and mental limits. The first three stages set the tone for the entire race.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2025
programme.sub-title: S01 : E20 WOF 2025 #20: ABSA Cape Epic Series - Episode 2
programme.desc: The Absa Cape Epic is known as one of the toughest mountain bike stage races in the world and pushes riders to their physical and mental limits. The first three stages set the tone for the entire race.

programme.title: WOF Evergreens
programme.sub-title: S01 : E46 Athlete Profile - Aurelien Routens
programme.desc: Aurelien Routens from France was vice world champion at the Freeride World Tour 2013 and has made a name for himself with his outstanding web series "Carpe Diem". In our 26-minute portrait, the 36-year-old talks about his life as a snowboard professional.

programme.title: WOF Evergreens
programme.sub-title: S01 : E47 Mammut Athlete Profile Dani Arnold - The Art of Iceclimbing
programme.desc: Daniel Arnold was born in 1984 in the Swiss canton of Uri and grew up in the small mountain village of Biel in the heart of the Swiss Alps. Dani and his brother experience all aspects of mountain life: hiking, skiing and climbing in some of the toughest climbing locations in the world

programme.title: WOF Evergreens
programme.sub-title: S01 : E50 Profile Freeskier Nadine Wallner
programme.desc: Nadine Wallner is a freeskier, climber and mountaineer who has experienced incredible highs and devastating lows on her journey of discovery. She takes part in the Freeride World Tour, the pinnacle of freeriding competition for skiers and snowboarders.

programme.title: WOF Evergreens
programme.sub-title: S01 : E52 Mammut Project360 - Mt. Everest - Nepal
programme.desc: "Project360" takes digital mapping into the third dimension and makes the legendary Eiger North Face a virtual experience. A view through the eyes of the climber, directly from the wall. The impressive 360° panorama of the walls: www.project360.mammut.ch

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2025
programme.sub-title: S01 : E42 WOF 2025 #42: IWSA WingFoil Racing World Cup - Türkiye & China
programme.desc: Across two continents, in Türkiye and China, the IWSA WingFoil Racing World Cup brings together the fastest and most skilled athletes on the water. From high-speed sprints to tight tactical maneuvers, every race tests precision, strategy, and courage.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2025
programme.sub-title: S01 : E45 WOF 2025 #45: IKA - Formula Kite World Championships
programme.desc: From September 28 to October 5, 2025, the world's best kitefoilers gathered at Poetto Beach in Quartu Sant'Elena, Sardinia, Italy, for the 2025 Formula Kite World Championship. The competition was marked by intense battles and dramatic twists and turns.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2025
programme.sub-title: S01 : E47 WOF 2025 #47: IWSA - Formula Wing World Championships
programme.desc: The 2025 IWSA Formula Wing World Championships brought the world’s best wing‑foil racers to the sparkling waters of Poetto Beach, Sardinia, for an unforgettable week of speed, skill, and adrenaline.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2025
programme.sub-title: S01 : E27 WOF 2025 #27: Epic Series - 4 Islands
programme.desc: The 4Islands Epic is a legendary stage race as part of the Epic Series, which takes place on the Croatian islands of the Kvarner region - Lošinj, Cres, Krk and occasionally Rab - and offers around 260 km and 5,600 vertical meters over five days (prologue + four stages).

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2025
programme.sub-title: S01 : E32 WOF 2025 #32: Epic Series - Andorra Epic
programme.desc: The Andorra Epic took place from July 15 to 18, 2025, in the breathtaking Pyrenees. Over four days, riders covered 160 km and 5,000 meters of elevation gain. The event offered world-class mountain biking in the unique atmosphere of Andorra's alpine villages.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2025
programme.sub-title: S01 : E41 WOF 2025 #41: Ötztaler Cycle Marathon
programme.desc: Every year towards the end of summer, around 4,000 cyclists gather in Sölden, Austria, for the legendary Ötztaler Cycle Marathon – considered one of the toughest cycle marathons in the Alps. The route covers 227 to 238 km.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2025
programme.sub-title: S01 : E44 WOF 2025 #44: Epic Series - SPAR Swiss Epic
programme.desc: The SPAR Swiss Epic is a five-day mountain bike stage race set in the breathtaking Swiss Alps. Riders from around the world take on challenging climbs, technical descents, and stunning Alpine trails through the region of Graubünden.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2018
programme.sub-title: S01 : E32 Mystic Sk8te Cup 2018 - Prague (CZE)
programme.desc: Welcome to the Mystic Sk8 Cup 2018! This year Prague welcomed 174 skateboarders, including 33 girls, from 29 countries to this three-day competition in Street, Bowl and Best Trick. Over 15,000 fans came to cheer on the best riders from around the world

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2023
programme.sub-title: S01 : E40 WOF 2023 #40: BetCity Royal Championships Queen & King of the Court 2023
programme.desc: Dieses Turnier ist größer als je zuvor, die besten Spieler der Welt kommen vom 5. bis 10. September nach 'Manhattan an der Maas'. Ein 'königliches' Stadion direkt im Stadtzentrum am Henegouwerplein ist der Schauplatz und Nebenplätze in den Vororten umrahmen dieses Ereignis.

programme.title: WOF Evergreens
programme.sub-title: S01 : E53 Roopkund - Mountainbike Expedition to the Indian Himalaya
programme.desc: Hans Rey, Richie Schley and Joscha Forstreuter travelled to the Indian Himalayas to the mysterious Roopkund Lake, which is known for having hundreds of ancient human skeletons lying dormant at its bottom. This is followed by a descent of 3,500 metres in altitude.

programme.title: WOF Evergreens
programme.sub-title: S01 : E54 Searching for the Rivergod II
programme.desc: The documentary "Searching for the River God - The Journey continues" shows in fantastic images extreme kayaking on the most attractive and remote rivers in the world in Siberia, the jungles of Mexico and in Iceland.

programme.title: WOF Evergreens
programme.sub-title: S01 : E55 adidas Sickline - Extreme Kayak World Championship - The Documentary
programme.desc: This is the documentary about the history of the famous "Wellerbrücke" rapids, a famous section of the glacier-fed Ötztaler Ache river in Tyrol, and the adidas Sickline Extreme Kayak World Championship.

programme.title: WOF Evergreens
programme.sub-title: S01 : E61 The history of competitive Snowboarding
programme.desc: This Competition is in human nature. But that was far from the thoughts of early pioneers in the nineteen hundreds or those of Mister Sherman Poppin of Michigan. In the Christmas of 1965 he invented the Snurfer. This changed the history of snowsports.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2026
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 WOF 2026 #02: World Rookie Tour 2025
programme.desc: The World Rookie Tour 2025 brought together the world’s most promising young snowboarders, freeskiers, and skateboarders. With stunning locations and a vibrant atmosphere, the World Rookie Tour 2025 celebrated the next generation of action sports stars.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2026
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 WOF 2026 #03: GKA Kite-Surf World Championship 2025 Season Recap
programme.desc: The 2025 GKA Kite-Surf World Championship Season delivered a thrilling year of high-level competition, with riders pushing the limits of wave riding across iconic locations around the globe. Consistency, technical precision, and powerful style defined the title race

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2026 - WOF 2026 _19_ Surffoiling _ the New World Tour SFT
programme.desc: Info not available

programme.title: Nendaz Backcountry Invitational - Live Delayed Part 1
programme.desc: Das Backcountry Invitational 2026 bringt eine ausgewählte Gruppe von Top-Freeride- und Freestyle-Athleten zu einem eintägigen Wettbewerb im alpinen Gelände oberhalb von Nendaz, Schweiz zusammen. Die Veranstaltung findet auf einer natürlichen Backcountry-Piste statt.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2021
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Ride Aletsch - Geraldine Fasnacht
programme.desc: In this Episode we accompany Geraldine Fasnacht on her adventure to ride the famous Aletsch Glacier. A lightweight airplane and former Freeride World Tour Champion Emilien Badoux help her to fulfill her dream.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2021
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Mission Antarctica
programme.desc: Xavier de Le Rue, multiple freeride world champion and two times Olympian returned from a trip to Antarctica with mixed feelings, although he had the experience of a lifetime and discovered a new paradise he believed he had only scratched the surface of it.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2021
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 Alaska or Bus´t - Profile Andrew Taylor
programme.desc: Alaska, one of the most sparsely populated areas in the world, has always been a dream-riding destination for American mountain biker Andrew Taylor. But being over 3,000 miles away from his hometown, it seemed a bit too far to just jump in the truck and go.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2021
programme.sub-title: S01 : E09 Bike2Boat
programme.desc: In the Bike 2 Boat adventurewe set off on a climate-neutral journey through the Alps together with four kayakers. We will accompany them on their search for extraordinary kayak spots and unforgettable experiences.

programme.title: Gold Coast Marathon 2025
programme.desc: 45th Gold Coast Marathon in Queensland, Australia: The world class marathon with more than 26.000 participants took place on the 6th of July 2025. It attracts annually some of the world´s most recognised marathoners on its famous flat and fast course.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2023
programme.sub-title: S01 : E52 WOF 2023 #52: World Rookie Tour Finals - Freestyle Ski and Snowboard
programme.desc: In der heutigen Episode gibt es die volle Dosis Freestyle Snowboarding und Skiing. Junge talentierte Athleten aus der ganzen Welt können bei den World Rookie Finals 2023 ihr Können unter Beweis stellen. Schauen wir uns das mal an!

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2020
programme.sub-title: S01 : E14 Engadinsnow - Silvaplana (SUI)
programme.desc: ENGADINSNOW is one of the oldest freeride competitions in the Alps. It is the world's only parallel freeride event. Teams of two ride the Corvatsch north face at the same time and compete with other teams.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2026
programme.sub-title: S01 : E10 WOF 2026 #10 Epic Series - Change is Inevitable
programme.desc: Welcome back to the Epic Series 2026. In this first episode we will dive deep into the heads of the worlds thoughest Mountainbikers who have and will again battle it out in the Cape Epic stagerace. The Absa Cape Epic is a physically gruelling and mentally demanding.

programme.title: Freeride World Tour 2023
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Freeride World Tour 2023 - stop #1 - Baqueira Beret (ESP)
programme.desc: The 2023 Freeride World Tour kicks off in January in its 16th season – as usual with the best freeriders all over the globe! The first stop of the tour takes place in Baqueira Beret.

programme.sub-title: S01 : E51 WOF 2025 #51: GKA Kite & GWA Wingfoil World Cup
programme.desc: The GKA Kite & GWA Wingfoil World Cup brings the world’s best kiteboarding and wingfoiling athletes to Fahid Island, UAE. Set against a stunning coastal backdrop, the event features high-performance racing and freestyle action in ideal wind and water conditions

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2025
programme.sub-title: S01 : E53 WOF 2025 #53: 44Cup Marina Jandía 2025
programme.desc: The 44CUP in Fuerteventura is an exclusive, high-energy event that brings together elite sport, lifestyle, and unforgettable island vibes.Athletes, creators, partners, and guests come together for an experience that goes far beyond sport.

programme.title: GKA Kite-Surf World Cup 2024 - Sal (CPV)
programme.desc: Cape Verde hosts the GKA Kite-Surf World Cup 2024, bringing together the world’s best kite-surfers. Athletes from around the globe compete for the title, showcasing impressive skills in wave-riding and strapless freestyle.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2025
programme.sub-title: S01 : E49 WOF 2025 #49: Nedbank Gravel Burn 2025 - Men´s Category
programme.desc: The Nedbank Gravel Burn is a week-long gravel stage race in South Africa that debuted in 2025. Over seven days, riders cover 800km and 11 000m of climbing while crossing diverse terrain, from coastal forests and rugged mountain passes

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2025
programme.sub-title: S01 : E50 WOF 2025 #50: Nedbank Gravel Burn 2025 - Women´s Category
programme.desc: The Nedbank Gravel Burn is a 7-day, full-service gravel stage race across South Africa, bringing top female athletes into one of the toughest endurance challenges on the continent. Covering over 800 km from coastal forests and ending in the Shamwari Reserve

programme.title: Desert Dash Namibia 2024
programme.desc: The Desert Dash 2024 is an exhilarating mountain biking event that challenges riders to conquer the breathtaking terrain of the Namib Desert. Spanning over 24 hours, participants embark on a grueling 369-kilometer journey.

programme.title: Cape Epic 2025
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Cape Epic 2025 - Prologue
programme.desc: The Cape Epic 2025 is one of the world's most important mountain bike stage races in the rugged landscape of South Africa. The event promises intense competition and unforgettable adventures

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2024
programme.sub-title: S01 : E30 WOF 2024 #30: DATEV Challenge Roth 2024
programme.desc: World’s biggest long-distance triathlon: DATEV Challenge Roth 2024July 7th, 2024The world’s best athletes will conquer the traditional triathlon distance of 3.8 km swimming, 180 km cycling and 42.2 km running through the district of Roth in Bavaria, Germany.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2025
programme.sub-title: S01 : E25 WOF 2025 #25: Golden Roof Challenge - Innsbruck (AUT)
programme.desc: On June 7, the Golden Roof Challenge celebrated its 21st edition in the heart of Innsbruck, Austria. Twenty top international pole vault and long jump athletes compete for crucial world ranking points on “The FlySwat”

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2021
programme.sub-title: S01 : E15 Alpine Rollercoaster
programme.desc: Dani Arnold from Bürglen in Switzerland is now one of the most renowned climbers in Europe. The project that made Dani famous was the speed record on the largest north face in Western Europe, the Eiger.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2021
programme.sub-title: S01 : E19 Deepline - Lukas Irmler
programme.desc: Today we accompany German highliner Lukas Irmler and his friends on their expedition into one of the deepest caves in the world - and experience how they cross the lowest slackline ever!

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2021
programme.sub-title: S01 : E20 A Song for Tomorrow
programme.desc: This April, Mayan Smith-Gobat and Ben Rueck joined China's renowned mountaineers Liu Yongbang (Abond) and Xiao Ting on an expedition to explore the Qingfeng Valley on the border of Zhangjiajie, China's first and largest national park.

programme.title: WHY WE FLY
programme.desc: Ever wondered what goes through someone’s mind as they jump from a helicopter above the Canadian Rockies? Then ride along with the Team KAVU athletes as they wingsuit, skydive, and speedride above scenic Fernie, British Columbia.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2026
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 WOF 2026 #04: Freestyle Pro Tour 2025
programme.desc: The Freestyle Pro Tour 2025 featured two memorable stops in Geneva, Switzerland, and Naxos, Greece, each offering unique conditions and spectacular action. Despite challenging wind conditions, the event delivered impressive performances and high-level freestyle riding

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2026
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 WOF 2026 #05: Queen & King of the Court
programme.desc: Queen & King of the Court went to London for a historic edition at the Crystal Palace National Sports Centre. Followed by another indoor event Queen & King of the Court travelled north to Hesinki, Finland.

programme.title: Simple Session 2025 - BMX Finals MEN
programme.desc: Simple Session is back at Unibet Arena in Tallinn, Estonia – celebrating its massive 25-year anniversary! A quarter-century of mind-blowing BMX riding and skateboarding, unforgettable moments, and a global community of athletes pushing the limits.Hoppla!

programme.desc: Das Backcountry Invitational 2026 bringt eine ausgewählte Gruppe von Top-Freeride- und Freestyle-Athleten zu einem eintägigen Wettbewerb im alpinen Gelände oberhalb von Nendaz, Schweiz zusammen. Die Veranstaltung findet auf einer natürlichen Backcountry-Piste statt

programme.title: One Water Race 2025 - 52min HL Show
programme.desc: The One Water Race 2025 is an endurance competition that takes place in the breathtaking Stockholm archipelago. The race combines swimming, running, and navigation on land and water. It is considered one of the toughest endurance races in the world.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2020
programme.sub-title: S01 : E15 Freeride World Tour - Best Of Season 2020 - Worldwide
programme.desc: The first stop of this year's Freeride World Tour was in Hakuba, Japan. Next the tour went to Kicking Horse in British Columbia. The third stop took the riders to Ordino Arcalis in the Pyrenees. The last stop was Fieberbrunn in Austria.
